findings.recommended_fix: Add a scope or permission check (e.g., required role or action) after authentication to enforce fine-grained authorization instead of relying solely on is_authenticated.

findings.issue: Missing tenant/owner filter on invoice load
findings.evidence_span: target.md: "loads invoice by id without tenant_id or owner_id filtering"
findings.recommended_fix: Add a tenant_id or owner_id filter when loading the invoice to ensure the authenticated user can only access invoices they own or are authorized to see.

findings.issue: Information leak in denial response body
findings.recommended_fix: Return only a generic error message (e.g., 'access denied') in the denial envelope and avoid exposing internal identifiers like invoice_id.
